---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: false
    resources:
      - shinylive-sw.js
      - data/index.json
      - data/ccusage_daily.json
      - data/ccusage_sessions.json
      - data/ccusage_blocks.json
      - data/gemini_daily.json
      - data/gemini_sessions.json
      - data/cmonitor_summary.json
      - data/git_commits.json
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 900

library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(tidyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate, warn.conflicts = FALSE)

# --- Data loading -------------------------------------------------------------
base_url <- "https://johngavin.github.io/llmtelemetry"

load_json <- function(filename) {
  tryCatch({
    tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".json")
    download.file(paste0(base_url, "/data/", filename), tmp, mode = "w", quiet = TRUE)
    fromJSON(txt = tmp, simplifyDataFrame = TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Failed to load ", filename, ": ", e$message)
    NULL
  })
}

cc_daily    <- load_json("ccusage_daily.json")
cc_sessions <- load_json("ccusage_sessions.json")
cc_blocks   <- load_json("ccusage_blocks.json")
gem_daily   <- load_json("gemini_daily.json")
gem_sess    <- load_json("gemini_sessions.json")
cmon        <- load_json("cmonitor_summary.json")
git_commits <- load_json("git_commits.json")

# Parse dates
if (!is.null(cc_daily) && nrow(cc_daily) > 0) {
  cc_daily$date <- as.Date(cc_daily$date)
}
if (!is.null(cc_sessions) && nrow(cc_sessions) > 0) {
  cc_sessions$lastActivity <- as.Date(cc_sessions$lastActivity)
}
if (!is.null(cc_blocks) && nrow(cc_blocks) > 0) {
  cc_blocks$startTime <- as.POSIXct(cc_blocks$startTime, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
  cc_blocks$endTime   <- as.POSIXct(cc_blocks$endTime, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
  cc_blocks$actualEndTime <- as.POSIXct(cc_blocks$actualEndTime, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%OS", tz = "UTC")
  cc_blocks$date <- as.Date(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$hour <- hour(cc_blocks$startTime)
  cc_blocks$wday <- wday(cc_blocks$startTime, label = TRUE)
  cc_blocks$duration_hrs <- as.numeric(
    difftime(coalesce(cc_blocks$actualEndTime, cc_blocks$endTime),
             cc_blocks$startTime, units = "hours")
  )
  cc_blocks$cost_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$costUSD / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 2), 0)
  cc_blocks$tok_per_hr <- ifelse(cc_blocks$duration_hrs > 0,
    round(cc_blocks$totalTokens / cc_blocks$duration_hrs, 0), 0)
}
if (!is.null(gem_daily) && nrow(gem_daily) > 0) {
  gem_daily$date <- as.Date(gem_daily$date)
}
if (!is.null(git_commits) && nrow(git_commits) > 0) {
  git_commits$date <- as.Date(git_commits$date)
}

# All project names for filter
all_projects <- if (!is.null(cc_daily) && nrow(cc_daily) > 0) {
  sort(unique(cc_daily$project))
} else {
  character(0)
}

# Date range
all_dates <- c(
  if (!is.null(cc_daily) && nrow(cc_daily) > 0) cc_daily$date,
  if (!is.null(gem_daily) && nrow(gem_daily) > 0) gem_daily$date
)
date_min <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) min(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date() - 90
date_max <- if (length(all_dates) > 0) max(all_dates, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date()
max_days <- as.numeric(date_max - date_min)

# --- Plotly dark theme (irishbuoys style) ------------------------------------
dark_axis <- list(
  gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)",
  zerolinecolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.2)",
  tickfont = list(color = "#cccccc", size = 11),
  titlefont = list(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 12)
)
dark_layout <- function(p, title = NULL, xaxis = list(), yaxis = list(), ...) {
  p |> layout(
    plot_bgcolor = "#1a1a1a",
    paper_bgcolor = "#1a1a1a",
    title = if (!is.null(title)) list(text = title, font = list(size = 14, color = "#e0e0e0")),
    xaxis = modifyList(dark_axis, xaxis),
    yaxis = modifyList(dark_axis, yaxis),
    legend = list(
      orientation = "h", y = -0.15, x = 0.5, xanchor = "center",
      font = list(color = "#e0e0e0", size = 11),
      bgcolor = "rgba(40,40,40,0.8)", bordercolor = "#555", borderwidth = 1
    ),
    hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white", font = list(color = "black", size = 12)),
    margin = list(b = 80, t = 40),
    ...
  ) |> config(scrollZoom = TRUE, displayModeBar = TRUE)
}

# Color palette
pal <- list(claude = "#377eb8", gemini = "#e41a1c", accent = "#4daf4a",
            purple = "#984ea3", orange = "#ff7f00", hist = "#377eb8")

# --- UI -----------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- page_navbar(
  title = "LLM Telemetry",
  theme = bs_theme(
    bg = "#1a1a1a", fg = "#e0e0e0",
    primary = "#377eb8", secondary = "#555555",
    font_scale = 0.85
  ),
  header = tags$style(HTML("
    .bslib-value-box .value-box-value { font-size: 1.4rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
    .bslib-value-box .value-box-title { font-size: 0.75rem !important; white-space: nowrap; }
    .card { background-color: #222 !important; border-color: #444 !important; }
    .card-header { background-color: #2a2a2a !important; color: #e0e0e0 !important; font-size: 0.85rem; }
    .card-footer { background-color: #1a1a1a !important; border-color: #333 !important; }
    .sidebar-content { background-color: #222 !important; }
    .js-plotly-plot { cursor: pointer; }
    .fullscreen-overlay {
      position: fixed !important; top: 0 !important; left: 0 !important;
      width: 100vw !important; height: 100vh !important; z-index: 9999 !important;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.95) !important; padding: 20px !important;
      overflow: auto !important; cursor: zoom-out !important; box-sizing: border-box !important;
    }
    .fullscreen-overlay .js-plotly-plot, .fullscreen-overlay .plotly {
      width: 100% !important; height: calc(100vh - 40px) !important;
    }
    table.dataTable { color: #e0e0e0 !important; }
    table.dataTable thead th { color: #e0e0e0 !important; background-color: #2a2a2a !important; }
    table.dataTable tbody td { border-color: #444 !important; }
    .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input { background-color: #333; color: #e0e0e0; border-color: #555; }
  ")),
  sidebar = sidebar(
    width = 220,
    sliderInput("horizon", "Time Horizon (days)",
      min = 7, max = max(max_days, 30), value = min(90, max_days), step = 7),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Cost Trends' || input.tabs == 'Token Analysis'",
      selectInput("projects", "Projects", choices = all_projects,
        selected = all_projects, multiple = TRUE)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Sessions'",
      numericInput("top_n", "Top N sessions", value = 10, min = 5, max = 50)
    ),
    conditionalPanel(
      condition = "input.tabs == 'Time Blocks'",
      sliderInput("block_days", "Block window (days)",
        min = 1, max = 60, value = 14, step = 1)
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Overview", value = "Overview",
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(3, 3, 3, 3),
      value_box("Total Cost", textOutput("vb_cost"), theme = "primary"),
      value_box("Total Tokens", textOutput("vb_tokens"), theme = "info"),
      value_box("Active Days", textOutput("vb_days"), theme = "success"),
      value_box("Sessions", textOutput("vb_sessions"), theme = "warning")
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Source Summary"), DTOutput("overview_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost, tokens, and session counts per data source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost (All Sources)"), plotlyOutput("overview_cost_ts", height = "500px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily cost time series combining Claude and Gemini usage"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Cost Trends", value = "Cost Trends",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Daily Cost by Project"), plotlyOutput("cost_by_project", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily Claude cost by project (lines+markers)")),
      card(card_header("Cumulative Cost"), plotlyOutput("cost_cumulative", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Running total of cost over time by source"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Source"), plotlyOutput("cost_weekly", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly cost grouped by Claude vs Gemini")),
      card(card_header("Weekly Cost by Model"), plotlyOutput("cost_by_model", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly cost by Claude model variant"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Token Analysis", value = "Token Analysis",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Daily Tokens"), plotlyOutput("token_daily", height = "500px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Daily token consumption across all sources"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Token Composition"), plotlyOutput("token_comp", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Grouped bars: input, output, cache-create, and cache-read tokens")),
      card(card_header("Weekly Tokens by Source"), plotlyOutput("token_weekly", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Weekly token usage by source"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Sessions", value = "Sessions",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Top Claude Sessions"), DTOutput("sess_claude"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Most expensive Claude sessions by total cost")),
      card(card_header("Top Gemini Sessions"), DTOutput("sess_gemini"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Most expensive Gemini sessions by total cost"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Session Cost Distribution"), plotlyOutput("sess_hist", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Histogram of per-session costs")),
      card(card_header("Sessions Over Time"), plotlyOutput("sess_scatter", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Bubble chart of Claude sessions by date, cost, and token volume"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Time Blocks", value = "Time Blocks",
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Block Activity"), DTOutput("block_table"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Claude coding blocks with cost and efficiency metrics"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Block Timeline"), plotlyOutput("block_timeline", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Gantt-style block start/end times colored by cost")),
      card(card_header("Hourly Activity Heatmap"), plotlyOutput("block_heatmap", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Cost heatmap by day of week and hour"))
    )
  ),

  nav_panel("Commits", value = "Commits",
    layout_columns(
      fill = FALSE, col_widths = c(4, 4, 4),
      value_box("Total Commits", textOutput("vb_commits"), theme = "primary"),
      value_box("Median Lines", textOutput("vb_median_lines"), theme = "info"),
      value_box("Mean Lines", textOutput("vb_mean_lines"), theme = "success")
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(12),
      card(card_header("Lines Changed per Commit"), plotlyOutput("commit_hist", height = "500px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Distribution of total lines changed per commit"))
    ),
    layout_columns(
      col_widths = c(6, 6),
      card(card_header("Lines Changed Over Time"), plotlyOutput("commit_scatter_time", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines changed per commit over time, sized by files changed")),
      card(card_header("Additions vs Deletions"), plotlyOutput("commit_scatter_add_del", height = "450px"),
        card_footer(class = "text-muted small", "Lines added vs deleted per commit"))
    )
  ),

  footer = tags$footer(
    class = "text-muted small text-center py-2",
    style = "background-color: #1a1a1a;",
    tags$a(href = "https://github.com/johngavin/llmtelemetry", style = "color: #7cb5ec;", "GitHub"),
    " | Data: ccusage, Gemini, cmonitor",
    " | Built: ", format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
  ),

  id = "tabs"
)

# --- Server -------------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  cutoff <- reactive(date_max - input$horizon)

  # Fullscreen toggle for plotly charts
  observe({
    session$sendCustomMessage("setupFullscreen", list())
  })

  # Filtered datasets
  cc_d <- reactive({
    if (is.null(cc_daily) || nrow(cc_daily) == 0) return(tibble())
    cc_daily |> filter(date >= cutoff())
  })
  gem_d <- reactive({
    if (is.null(gem_daily) || nrow(gem_daily) == 0) return(tibble())
    gem_daily |> filter(date >= cutoff())
  })
  cc_d_proj <- reactive({
    d <- cc_d()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(d)
    if (length(input$projects) > 0) d <- d |> filter(project %in% input$projects)
    d
  })

  # --- Overview ---------------------------------------------------------------
  output$vb_cost <- renderText({
    cc <- if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) sum(cc_d()$totalCost, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    gm <- if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) sum(gem_d()$total_cost, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    sprintf("$%s", format(round(cc + gm), big.mark = ","))
  })
  output$vb_tokens <- renderText({
    cc <- if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) sum(cc_d()$totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    gm <- if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) sum(gem_d()$total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    total <- cc + gm
    if (total >= 1e9) sprintf("%.1fB", total / 1e9)
    else if (total >= 1e6) sprintf("%.1fM", total / 1e6)
    else format(total, big.mark = ",")
  })
  output$vb_days <- renderText({
    dates <- c(
      if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) unique(cc_d()$date),
      if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) unique(gem_d()$date)
    )
    as.character(length(unique(dates)))
  })
  output$vb_sessions <- renderText({
    n <- if (!is.null(cc_sessions)) nrow(cc_sessions) else 0
    n <- n + if (!is.null(gem_sess)) nrow(gem_sess) else 0
    as.character(n)
  })

  output$overview_table <- renderDT({
    rows <- list()

    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      cc_sum <- cc_d() |>
        summarise(
          cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), tokens = sum(totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE),
          days = n_distinct(date),
          min_date = min(date), max_date = max(date)
        )
      rows[[1]] <- tibble(
        Source = "Claude (ccusage)",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", cc_sum$cost),
        `$/Day` = sprintf("$%.2f", cc_sum$cost / max(cc_sum$days, 1)),
        Tokens = format(cc_sum$tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = cc_sum$days,
        Sessions = if (!is.null(cc_sessions)) nrow(cc_sessions) else 0L,
        `Date Range` = paste(cc_sum$min_date, "to", cc_sum$max_date)
      )
    }

    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_sum <- gem_d() |>
        summarise(
          cost = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE), tokens = sum(total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE),
          days = n_distinct(date),
          min_date = min(date), max_date = max(date)
        )
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        Source = "Gemini",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", gm_sum$cost),
        `$/Day` = sprintf("$%.2f", gm_sum$cost / max(gm_sum$days, 1)),
        Tokens = format(gm_sum$tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = gm_sum$days,
        Sessions = if (!is.null(gem_sess)) nrow(gem_sess) else 0L,
        `Date Range` = paste(gm_sum$min_date, "to", gm_sum$max_date)
      )
    }

    if (!is.null(cmon) && !is.null(cmon$total_cost)) {
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        Source = "cmonitor",
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", cmon$total_cost),
        `$/Day` = "-",
        Tokens = format(cmon$total_tokens, big.mark = ","),
        Days = NA_integer_,
        Sessions = NA_integer_,
        `Date Range` = if (!is.null(cmon$date_range)) cmon$date_range else "-"
      )
    }

    tbl <- bind_rows(rows)
    datatable(tbl, options = list(dom = "t", paging = FALSE, searching = FALSE),
      rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$overview_cost_ts <- renderPlotly({
    traces <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      cc_agg <- cc_d() |> group_by(date) |> summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
      traces[[1]] <- list(data = cc_agg, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude)
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_agg <- gem_d() |> rename(cost = total_cost)
      traces[[length(traces) + 1]] <- list(data = gm_agg, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    }
    p <- plot_ly()
    for (tr in traces) {
      p <- p |> add_trace(data = tr$data, x = ~date, y = ~cost, type = "scatter",
        mode = "lines+markers", name = tr$name,
        line = list(color = tr$color, width = 2),
        marker = list(color = tr$color, size = 5, opacity = 0.7))
    }
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = ""), yaxis = list(title = "Cost (USD)"))
  })

  # --- Cost Trends ------------------------------------------------------------
  output$cost_by_project <- renderPlotly({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    d_agg <- d |> group_by(date, project) |>
      summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
    p <- plot_ly(d_agg, x = ~date, y = ~cost, color = ~project, type = "scatter",
      mode = "lines+markers", marker = list(size = 3, opacity = 0.6))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = ""), yaxis = list(title = "Cost (USD)"))
  })

  output$cost_cumulative <- renderPlotly({
    traces <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      cc_cum <- cc_d() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        arrange(date) |> mutate(cum_cost = cumsum(cost))
      traces[[1]] <- list(data = cc_cum, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude)
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_cum <- gem_d() |> arrange(date) |> mutate(cum_cost = cumsum(total_cost))
      traces[[length(traces) + 1]] <- list(data = gm_cum, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    }
    p <- plot_ly()
    for (tr in traces) {
      p <- p |> add_trace(data = tr$data, x = ~date, y = ~cum_cost, type = "scatter",
        mode = "lines", name = tr$name, line = list(color = tr$color, width = 2))
    }
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = ""), yaxis = list(title = "Cumulative Cost (USD)"))
  })

  output$cost_weekly <- renderPlotly({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d()) > 0) {
      cc_wk <- cc_d() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Claude")
      rows[[1]] <- cc_wk
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_wk <- gem_d() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(cost = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Gemini")
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- gm_wk
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    d <- bind_rows(rows)
    p <- plot_ly(d, x = ~week, y = ~cost, color = ~source, type = "bar",
      colors = c("Claude" = pal$claude, "Gemini" = pal$gemini))
    dark_layout(p, barmode = "group",
      xaxis = list(title = "Week"), yaxis = list(title = "Cost (USD)"))
  })

  output$cost_by_model <- renderPlotly({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())

    model_weekly <- d |>
      separate_rows(modelsUsed, sep = ",\\s*") |>
      filter(modelsUsed != "") |>
      mutate(
        model = gsub("claude-", "", modelsUsed),
        week = floor_date(date, "week")
      ) |>
      group_by(week, model) |>
      summarise(cost = sum(totalCost, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

    p <- plot_ly(model_weekly, x = ~week, y = ~cost, color = ~model,
      type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
      marker = list(size = 4, opacity = 0.7))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Week"), yaxis = list(title = "Cost (USD)"))
  })

  # --- Token Analysis ---------------------------------------------------------
  output$token_daily <- renderPlotly({
    traces <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d_proj()) > 0) {
      cc_tok <- cc_d_proj() |> group_by(date) |>
        summarise(tokens = sum(totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
      traces[[1]] <- list(data = cc_tok, name = "Claude", color = pal$claude)
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_tok <- gem_d() |> rename(tokens = total_tokens)
      traces[[length(traces) + 1]] <- list(data = gm_tok, name = "Gemini", color = pal$gemini)
    }
    p <- plot_ly()
    for (tr in traces) {
      p <- p |> add_trace(data = tr$data, x = ~date, y = ~tokens, type = "scatter",
        mode = "lines+markers", name = tr$name,
        line = list(color = tr$color, width = 2),
        marker = list(color = tr$color, size = 4, opacity = 0.7))
    }
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = ""), yaxis = list(title = "Tokens"))
  })

  output$token_comp <- renderPlotly({
    d <- cc_d_proj()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    tok <- d |> group_by(date) |>
      summarise(
        Input = sum(inputTokens, na.rm = TRUE),
        Output = sum(outputTokens, na.rm = TRUE),
        `Cache Create` = sum(cacheCreation, na.rm = TRUE),
        `Cache Read` = sum(cacheRead, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) |>
      pivot_longer(-date, names_to = "type", values_to = "tokens")
    p <- plot_ly(tok, x = ~date, y = ~tokens, color = ~type, type = "bar",
      colors = c("Input" = pal$claude, "Output" = pal$gemini,
                 "Cache Create" = pal$accent, "Cache Read" = pal$orange))
    dark_layout(p, barmode = "group",
      xaxis = list(title = ""), yaxis = list(title = "Tokens"))
  })

  output$token_weekly <- renderPlotly({
    rows <- list()
    if (nrow(cc_d_proj()) > 0) {
      cc_wk <- cc_d_proj() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(tokens = sum(totalTokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Claude")
      rows[[1]] <- cc_wk
    }
    if (nrow(gem_d()) > 0) {
      gm_wk <- gem_d() |> mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week")) |>
        group_by(week) |> summarise(tokens = sum(total_tokens, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
        mutate(source = "Gemini")
      rows[[length(rows) + 1]] <- gm_wk
    }
    if (length(rows) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    d <- bind_rows(rows)
    p <- plot_ly(d, x = ~week, y = ~tokens, color = ~source, type = "bar",
      colors = c("Claude" = pal$claude, "Gemini" = pal$gemini))
    dark_layout(p, barmode = "group",
      xaxis = list(title = "Week"), yaxis = list(title = "Tokens"))
  })

  # --- Sessions ---------------------------------------------------------------
  output$sess_claude <- renderDT({
    if (is.null(cc_sessions) || nrow(cc_sessions) == 0) return(datatable(tibble()))
    cc_sessions |>
      arrange(desc(totalCost)) |>
      head(input$top_n) |>
      mutate(totalCost = sprintf("$%.2f", totalCost),
             totalTokens = format(totalTokens, big.mark = ",")) |>
      select(Session = sessionId, Cost = totalCost, Tokens = totalTokens,
             `Last Active` = lastActivity, Models = modelsUsed) |>
      datatable(options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
        rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$sess_gemini <- renderDT({
    if (is.null(gem_sess) || nrow(gem_sess) == 0) return(datatable(tibble()))
    gem_sess |>
      arrange(desc(total_cost)) |>
      head(input$top_n) |>
      mutate(total_cost = sprintf("$%.4f", total_cost),
             total_tokens = format(total_tokens, big.mark = ",")) |>
      select(Session = sessionId, Project = project, Cost = total_cost,
             Tokens = total_tokens, Started = start_time) |>
      datatable(options = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
        rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$sess_hist <- renderPlotly({
    costs <- c()
    if (!is.null(cc_sessions) && nrow(cc_sessions) > 0) costs <- c(costs, cc_sessions$totalCost)
    if (!is.null(gem_sess) && nrow(gem_sess) > 0) costs <- c(costs, gem_sess$total_cost)
    if (length(costs) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    p <- plot_ly(x = ~costs, type = "histogram", nbinsx = 20,
      marker = list(color = pal$hist, opacity = 0.8))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Session Cost (USD)"), yaxis = list(title = "Count"))
  })

  output$sess_scatter <- renderPlotly({
    if (is.null(cc_sessions) || nrow(cc_sessions) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    p <- plot_ly(cc_sessions, x = ~lastActivity, y = ~totalCost,
      size = ~totalTokens, type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      text = ~sessionId, hoverinfo = "text+x+y",
      marker = list(sizemode = "area", sizeref = max(cc_sessions$totalTokens) / 1000,
        color = pal$claude, opacity = 0.7))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Last Activity"), yaxis = list(title = "Total Cost (USD)"))
  })

  # --- Time Blocks ------------------------------------------------------------
  blk <- reactive({
    if (is.null(cc_blocks) || nrow(cc_blocks) == 0) return(tibble())
    cc_blocks |> filter(date >= (date_max - input$block_days))
  })

  output$block_table <- renderDT({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(datatable(tibble()))
    d |>
      mutate(
        Start = format(startTime, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"),
        End = format(coalesce(actualEndTime, endTime), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"),
        Duration = sprintf("%.1fh", duration_hrs),
        Cost = sprintf("$%.2f", costUSD),
        `$/hr` = sprintf("$%.2f", cost_per_hr),
        Tokens = format(totalTokens, big.mark = ","),
        `Tok/hr` = format(tok_per_hr, big.mark = ",")
      ) |>
      select(Start, End, Duration, Cost, `$/hr`, Tokens, `Tok/hr`, Models = models) |>
      datatable(options = list(pageLength = 15, dom = "frtip", scrollX = TRUE,
        columnDefs = list(list(targets = 7, render = DT::JS(
          "function(data, type, row) { return '<span style=\"white-space:nowrap\">' + data + '</span>'; }"
        )))),
        rownames = FALSE)
  })

  output$block_timeline <- renderPlotly({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    d <- d |> mutate(label = format(date, "%m-%d"))
    p <- plot_ly(d, x = ~startTime,
      xend = ~coalesce(actualEndTime, endTime),
      y = ~label, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
      line = list(width = 10),
      color = ~costUSD,
      colors = c("#2a2a2a", "#e41a1c"),
      text = ~paste0("$", round(costUSD, 2), " | ", format(totalTokens, big.mark = ","), " tok"),
      hoverinfo = "text+x")
    dark_layout(p, showlegend = FALSE,
      xaxis = list(title = "Time"), yaxis = list(title = "", categoryorder = "category descending"))
  })

  output$block_heatmap <- renderPlotly({
    d <- blk()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    heat <- d |>
      group_by(wday, hour) |>
      summarise(cost = sum(costUSD, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      complete(wday, hour = 0:23, fill = list(cost = 0))
    p <- plot_ly(heat, x = ~hour, y = ~wday, z = ~cost,
      type = "heatmap", colorscale = list(c(0, "#1a1a1a"), c(0.5, "#ff7f00"), c(1, "#e41a1c")),
      hovertemplate = "Hour: %{x}<br>Day: %{y}<br>Cost: $%{z:.2f}<extra></extra>")
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Hour of Day", dtick = 3), yaxis = list(title = ""))
  })

  # --- Commits -----------------------------------------------------------------
  commits_filt <- reactive({
    if (is.null(git_commits) || nrow(git_commits) == 0) return(tibble())
    git_commits |> filter(date >= cutoff())
  })

  output$vb_commits <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(nrow(d))
  })
  output$vb_median_lines <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(round(median(d$lines_changed, na.rm = TRUE)))
  })
  output$vb_mean_lines <- renderText({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return("0")
    as.character(round(mean(d$lines_changed, na.rm = TRUE)))
  })

  output$commit_hist <- renderPlotly({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    p <- plot_ly(d, x = ~lines_changed, type = "histogram", nbinsx = 30,
      marker = list(color = pal$hist, opacity = 0.8))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Lines Changed"), yaxis = list(title = "Number of Commits"))
  })

  output$commit_scatter_time <- renderPlotly({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    p <- plot_ly(d, x = ~date, y = ~lines_changed,
      size = ~files_changed, type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      text = ~paste0(hash, ": ", message),
      hoverinfo = "text+x+y",
      marker = list(sizemode = "area",
        sizeref = max(d$files_changed, na.rm = TRUE) / 500,
        color = pal$claude, opacity = 0.7))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Date"), yaxis = list(title = "Lines Changed"))
  })

  output$commit_scatter_add_del <- renderPlotly({
    d <- commits_filt()
    if (nrow(d) == 0) return(plotly_empty())
    p <- plot_ly(d, x = ~lines_added, y = ~lines_deleted,
      size = ~files_changed, type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
      text = ~paste0(hash, ": ", message),
      hoverinfo = "text+x+y",
      marker = list(sizemode = "area",
        sizeref = max(d$files_changed, na.rm = TRUE) / 500,
        color = pal$gemini, opacity = 0.7))
    dark_layout(p, xaxis = list(title = "Lines Added"), yaxis = list(title = "Lines Deleted"))
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
